name: isHistory CMS

releases.author: dr-ishaan
releases.description:
## isHistory CMS v1.6.0 — Trust & Workflow

A reliability and workflow release with 10 features focused on trust, safety, and smooth daily use.

### What's New

| # | Feature | What It Does |
|---|---------|-------------|
| 1 | **Pre-flight Validation Gate** | Validates your post before pre-flight — warns you about errors before publishing |
| 2 | **Track Deletion Warning** | Warns you how many posts use a track before you delete it |
| 3 | **Failed Save Notice** | Shows a clear Obsidian Notice when settings fail to save |
| 4 | **Cross-field Settings Validation** | Warns when settings conflict (e.g., min > max, same paths) |
| 5 | **Deep-merge Settings** | Safe upgrades without data loss — new fields merge in, your existing settings stay |
| 6 | **Status Bar Health Indicator** | Content health at a glance: green (ready), yellow (warnings), red (errors) |
| 7 | **Sort Options Dropdown** | Six sort modes: Series Order, Newest, Oldest, Title A-Z, Errors First, Drafts First |
| 8 | **Recently Modified Filter** | Shows posts edited in the last 24 hours |
| 9 | **Right-click Context Menus** | Quick validate, pre-flight, and open-in-dashboard from the file explorer |
| 10 | **Search Debounce (200ms)** | Smooth search performance — no lag while typing |

### Security

- Release assets built via GitHub Actions with **artifact attestations** for cryptographic provenance verification
- No `innerHTML` usage — all DOM manipulation uses Obsidian's `createEl` API
- No `!important` in CSS — proper selector specificity used instead
- No `builtin-modules` npm dependency — uses Node.js built-in `module.builtinModules`

### Upgrade Notes

Your settings are preserved through deep-merge. New fields are added with safe defaults. No action required — just update and continue working.

### Full Changelog

https://github.com/dr-ishaan/astro-cms-obsidian-plugin/compare/1.5.0...1.6.0
releases.name: v1.6.0 — Trust & Workflow

releases.author: dr-ishaan
releases.description:
## isHistory CMS v1.5.0

A massive settings overhaul that replaces confusing sliders with proper input types, and introduces the dynamic track system.

### Features

- **Full Settings UX Overhaul** — Every setting now uses the right input type: text fields for text, number inputs for numbers, color pickers for colors, toggles for on/off. No more sliders for everything!
- **Dynamic Track System** — Create any track type with custom codes, emojis, and colors. Default tracks: A (Articles), P (Profiles), E (Events)
- **Template Engine** — Use variables like `{{seriesOrder}}`, `{{trackName}}`, and `{{date}}` in new post templates
- **Chip Editors** — Add and remove statuses and required fields with visual chip/tag editors
- **Color Pickers** — Native color pickers for track colors instead of typing hex codes
- **Reset Buttons** — One-click reset to defaults for tracks and other configurable sections

### Bug Fixes

- Replaced all confusing range sliders with proper input types
- Fixed settings that were hard to configure for non-technical users

### Upgrade Notes

Your existing settings are preserved through deep-merge. New settings fields are added automatically with safe defaults.
releases.name: v1.5.0 — Settings That Make Sense

releases.author: dr-ishaan
releases.description:
## isHistory CMS v1.1.0

A stability release that fixes critical bugs found after the initial launch.

### Bug Fixes

- **Fixed plugin freeze on file open** — The dashboard no longer freezes when switching files. Root cause: `querySelector` with orphan div fallback replaced with `this.contentEl`
- **Fixed sidebar not updating** — The Quick Validate sidebar now correctly refreshes when you switch between files
- **Fixed floating promise errors** — All async operations now use `await` or `void` prefix to prevent unhandled promise rejections
- **Fixed invalid event name** — Changed from incorrect event listener to proper `file-open` event for sidebar auto-update

### Improvements

- Added ESLint with `eslint-plugin-obsidian` for consistent code quality
- All 30 audit findings from code review addressed

### Upgrade Notes

Your settings are preserved. Simply replace the three plugin files (`main.js`, `manifest.json`, `styles.css`).
releases.name: v1.1.0 — Bug Squashing

releases.author: dr-ishaan
releases.description:
## isHistory CMS v1.0.0

The first public release of isHistory CMS — your Astro website's control panel inside Obsidian.

### Features

- **isHistory Toggle** — Mark any post as `isHistory: true` in frontmatter to opt into CMS management
- **Frontmatter Validation** — Checks that every managed post has required fields (title, date, description)
- **Basic Pre-flight** — Marks a draft as ready for deployment by setting `draft: false` and `status: published`
- **Obsidian Commands** — Open dashboard, validate current post, and pre-flight current draft from the command palette
- **Status Bar** — Quick health indicator at the bottom of Obsidian

### Installation

Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` and place them in `.obsidian/plugins/ishistory-cms/`.

### Requirements

- Obsidian v1.0.0+
- An Astro project with Content Collections
releases.name: v1.0.0 — The Beginning
